prestazioni: Engine: Replace the stock M20A-FKS 2.0L naturally aspirated inline-4 (215 Nm torque, 126 kW) with a **HKS GT-SS Supercharger Kit** (centrifugal type, 7 psi boost, 280+ hp, 320 Nm torque) paired with a **TODA Racing forged piston set** (8.5:1 compression ratio) and **Tomei 272° camshafts** for optimized airflow. Include a **GReddy intercooler** (front-mount, 600x300x76mm core) and **HKS Hi-Power exhaust** (76mm titanium tips, 304 stainless steel mandrel-bent piping).

Drivetrain: Install a **OS Giken Super Lock LSD** (2-way, 40% preload) in the TNGA-C platform’s 6-speed manual transmission (only compatible with GR Sport trim) and pair with a **Spec Stage 3+ clutch** (multi-disc, 800 lb-ft torque capacity). Upgrade the driveshafts to **Toyota Racing Development (TRD) carbon fiber units** (20% lighter, 30% stiffer) to handle increased power.

Suspension & Handling: Replace the stock GR Sport suspension with **Öhlins Road & Track DFV dampers** (adjustable compression/rebound, 20-way damping) and **SuperPro poly bushings** (full kit, 70D durometer). Add **Tein EnduraPro Plus coilovers** (10kg/mm front, 8kg/mm rear springs) and **D2 Racing 350mm 2-piece rotors** (6-piston calipers, slotted/drilled) with **Project Mu 999.9 brake pads**. Fit **Enkei PF07 wheels** (18x8.5 +35 offset, 7.5kg each) wrapped in **Michelin Pilot Sport Cup 2** (235/40R18, semi-slick compound).
estetica: Aero: Install the **Liberty Walk LB Works C-HR widebody kit** (carbon fiber fenders, 50mm extended wheel arches, front canards, and rear diffuser) with a **Seibon Carbon hood** (dual heat extractors, 30% weight reduction). Add a **Vortex Generator** (carbon fiber, roof-mounted) and **Rally Armor UR mud flaps** (custom-cut for C-HR GR Sport, red/black contrast stitching).

Exterior: Apply a **3M 1080 Gloss Black vinyl wrap** (matte clear coat overlay) with **Avery Dennison Supreme Wrapping Film** accents (GR Sport red, pinstriping). Replace all badges with **5Zigen Type-GT emblems** (black/chrome) and fit **Valenti LED taillights** (sequential turn signals, smoked lenses). Add **VMR V710 wheels** (19x9.5 +25 offset, gunmetal finish) for aggressive stance.

Interior: Replace the stock seats with **Recaro Pole Position SP-G** (red Alcantara, carbon fiber backs) and install a **NRG Innovations quick-release steering wheel** (350mm, suede grip, GR Sport logo embroidery). Add a **Defi BF Advance gauge cluster** (oil pressure, boost, wideband AFR) and **Takata Drift II harnesses** (4-point, FIA-approved). Wrap the dash in **Nappa leather** (red/black, contrast stitching) and fit **MOMO Prototipo pedals** (aluminum, drilled).
